official_functions.role: Construct the official Login clientbound login_compression packet fixture
Write the official Login clientbound login_compression body through FriendlyByteBuf.writeVarInt
Write the full Login clientbound framed login_compression packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login clientbound framed login_compression packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login clientbound state
Read decoded Login compression threshold and confirm the clientbound listener surface

invariants: The official Login clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the login_compression body.
The official Login clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundLoginCompressionPacket.
The official ClientboundLoginCompressionPacket body is exactly one FriendlyByteBuf VarInt compressionThreshold.
The decoded official ClientboundLoginCompressionPacket preserves compressionThreshold from the fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, Login clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.

This contract does not prove compression negotiation policy, connection compression activation, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer compression negotiation policy, connection compression activation, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
